name: JetBlue Airways Corporation
description: JetBlue Airways Corporation is an American low-cost airline headquartered in Long Island City, New York. Founded in 1999, the company operates as a major passenger carrier, providing air transportation services across the United States, the Caribbean, Latin America, and the Atlantic. Known for its focus on customer experience, JetBlue operates a network of focus cities, including its primary hub at John F. Kennedy International Airport. The airline offers a variety of services, including scheduled passenger flights, vacation packages, and loyalty programs, aiming to bring humanity back to air travel.
